_note: Re-recorded for u136 Step 2 (feed-image-metadata-harvest); original u1 Extension #3 recording was 2026-05-01. Tests must NOT re-fetch — they replay this body via httpx.MockTransport. Re-record only when the live feed structure changes; document the change in aidlc-docs/audit.md. Yonhap 마켓+ feed is RSS 2.0; <pubDate> is RFC 822 with +0900 (KST) offset; titles and descriptions are CDATA-wrapped Korean text (UTF-8); every item in this recording carries a <dc:creator> element under the dc namespace (http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/), but per FD L6.7 the adapter MUST treat <dc:creator> as optional and OMIT the raw_metadata.creator key when absent (not emit empty string). The feed declares xmlns:content / xmlns:media / xmlns:atom / xmlns:sy at the rss root; 98 of the 120 items carry one or more <media:content url=… type="image/jpeg"> children (wire photos: img.yna.co.kr/photo/{reuters,ap,af,…}/…) and 22 items carry none — since u136 the adapter harvests the FIRST image per item into raw_metadata.image_url/image_mime (the feed has no width/height attrs and no <media:credit>, so those keys never appear for this source). Wire photos are copyrighted; metadata harvest is safe, any republication is gated by u137. Recorder UA 'investo-fixture-recorder@example.com' is for fixture-provenance audit only — the production adapter sends NO custom UA (R14 does NOT apply to this source).
